rulings.Case Title: OLGA BALTODANO VS. ERNESTO ALONSO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 29, 2018 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTS EMMA LOPEZ, ALEX LOPEZ, MYRNA FUNES, and LIZETTE ALTAMIRANO's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer by tenants out-of-possession is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Cross-Complaint states a cause of action for declaratory relief. Demurrer by tenants in possession is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. As to occupants of unit 3402 there is an adequate remedy at law for the declaration sought (Cross-Complain, paragraph 42) if and when these Cross-Defendants choose to pursue their rights under Ellis Act. Until such time this alleged controversy is not justiciable as it is not ripe. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XIAOWEN LI AND YONG LIANG, TRANSFEREES, ET AL VS. JAMES D. BANKS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant James Banks' Motion For A Temporary Stay And Stay Pending Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 29, 2018 line 2. Defendant James Banks' Motion For A Temporary Stay And Stay Pending Appeal GRANTED in part and CONTINUED in part. This motion is continued to November 27, 2018. Stay is granted through November 27, 2018. Defendant shall be prepared to post the amount equivalent to Plaintiff's monthly mortgage, monthly insurance payment and monthly tax payment (if any). No later than 9:00 a.m. on October 29, 2018 Plaintiff to submit a declaration stating the exact amount of the payments listed above, with copies of mortgage, tax and insurance bills, if available. The posting shall be made no later than October 31, 2018 and shall be remitted to the Plaintiff forthwith by the clerk of the Court. = (501/REQ)
